name: Aspire Landscaping Business Management API
what_it_does: Aspire REST API for commercial landscaping business management platform. Enables AI agents to manage customer accounts and job schedules, track crew assignments and time entries, access job cost and profitability data, handle estimates and proposals, manage equipment and fleet, retrieve contract and renewal data, and integrate landscaping operations with accounting and CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing job schedules and crew routing from field operations agents
Tracking labor and material costs from job costing automation agents
Retrieving customer contract and renewal status from account management agents
Integrating job completion data with invoicing from billing automation agents
not_for: Residential lawn care without commercial landscaping enterprise management
Horticulture retail without field service scheduling
Small owner-operated lawn services without crew management needs
best_when: A commercial landscaping company using Aspire wants AI agents to automate job scheduling, crew management, job cost tracking, and customer account management workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer property and contract data requires careful handling. Employee time and location tracking data requires compliance with applicable labor and privacy laws.

auth.notes: Aspire uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Company-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Scopes control access to operational and financial data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — commercial landscaping enterprise SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing; enterprise contracts for large landscaping companies
pricing.notes: Virginia Beach company. Founded 2012. Market leader for commercial landscaping business management. Acquired by ServiceTitan in 2022. Strong in large commercial landscaping companies.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee time/location tracking requires compliance with labor and privacy laws
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
ServiceTitan acquisition 2022 — API roadmap may integrate with ServiceTitan platform
Commercial landscaping focus — residential services have different workflow patterns
Job costing data is financially sensitive — control access carefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: Landscaping job cost and employee tracking data. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency. ServiceTitan subsidiary.

security_score_components.security_notes: Job cost and employee location data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. ServiceTitan-owned.
